name: flux2_tile_upscale
description: CLOUD ONLY tiled upscale/re-detail: lanczos pre-scale, then Flux 2 dev (fp8 mixed) refines tile-by-tile via UltimateSDUpscale (No Upscale). Two LoRA slots: turbo (required for steps<=12) + optional character/style. IDENTITY RECIPE (verified): character LoRA needs its TRIGGER WORD in detail_prompt (e.g. 'your_trigger_word, cinematic close-up...'), strength ~0.9, denoise 0.3-0.35, steps 16 - then tiles reconstruct character-true detail; without the trigger the LoRA smears its prior and degrades the image. Generic upscales: char strength 0, denoise 0.2-0.25. The cloud catalog has no ESRGAN models, hence lanczos+refine. Upload source with cloud_upload_input; run via run_cloud_workflow (credits).

image.description: Source image name on the cloud (from cloud_upload_input).

model.description: Flux 2 dev build: flux2_dev_fp8mixed.safetensors (default, faster/cheaper) or flux2-dev.safetensors (full precision, slower per tile). Not Klein.

scale_by.description: Upscale factor (lanczos pre-scale; tiles refine the result).

lora_name.description: Flux 2 LoRA. Turbo (default) allows 8 steps; alternatives: flux2-lenovo_ultrareal.safetensors, flux2-boreal_dev2_boring_reality_for_dev.safetensors, flux2-herbst_photo_analog_film.safetensors.

lora_strength.description: Turbo LoRA strength. Keep at 1.0 whenever steps <= 12 - it is what makes few-step tiles viable.

character_lora.description: Optional second LoRA (character/style), chained after turbo.

character_lora_strength.description: 0 = off (default). For identity reinforcement during upscale keep <= 0.4; at 1.0 every tile gets re-imprinted with the LoRA subject and real edges dissolve.

detail_prompt.default: ultra detailed, sharp focus, fine photographic texture, high quality
detail_prompt.description: What the tiles should reinforce; keep generic unless the image needs steering.

guidance.description: Flux guidance for the tile passes.

steps.description: Steps per tile (12 with the turbo LoRA; ~20 without). USDU only runs the last denoise*steps of them - keep effective steps >= 3.

seam_fix_mode.description: Seam treatment: 'Half Tile' (default, hides tile edges, ~40% more tile passes), 'Band Pass' (cheaper), 'None' (fastest, risks grid lines).

denoise.description: Tile denoise: 0.15 subtle cleanup, 0.25 balanced, 0.35+ re-detail (risks drift).

inputs.text: ultra detailed, sharp focus, fine photographic texture, high quality
